name: Cursor
description: A standalone AI-native code editor forked from VS Code that deeply integrates LLMs into the development workflow. It features autonomous agents that can plan, edit multiple files simultaneously, and execute terminal commands while maintaining full codebase awareness.

name: Windsurf
description: An AI-native IDE built on a VS Code fork that features Cascade, an agentic coding assistant capable of deep codebase reasoning and multi-file refactoring. It seamlessly integrates with the Devin autonomous agent to handle complex, long-running tasks in the cloud while maintaining a high-performance local editing flow.

name: Trae
description: An adaptive, AI-powered IDE built on the VS Code framework that features an autonomous agent called SOLO. It integrates frontier models like Claude 4 and GPT-4o to provide deep workspace context for automated project generation and debugging.

name: Zed
description: A high-performance, multiplayer code editor built in Rust that leverages GPU acceleration for near-instant responsiveness. It combines the speed of a lightweight text editor with native AI integration and seamless real-time collaboration tools.

name: PearAI
description: An open-source, AI-first code editor forked from VS Code that integrates a curated selection of leading AI tools. It provides a unified interface for AI chat, inline editing, and agentic workflows while prioritizing privacy through local indexing and BYOK support.

name: Antigravity
description: Antigravity is an agent-first development platform from Google that evolves the traditional IDE into a mission control for autonomous AI agents. It enables developers to delegate complex, multi-tool tasks across the editor, terminal, and browser while maintaining oversight through verifiable artifacts.

name: Void
description: Void is an open-source AI code editor and VS Code fork designed as a privacy-centric alternative to Cursor. It allows developers to connect directly to LLM providers or run local models, ensuring code and prompts never pass through a third-party backend.

name: Verdent
description: An agentic AI coding platform that coordinates multiple specialized agents to plan, write, and verify code across isolated workspaces. It enables parallel execution of complex tasks like refactoring and feature development while maintaining deep project-wide context through a structured Plan-Verify-Code workflow.

name: Pochi
description: Pochi is an open-source AI coding agent that functions as an autonomous full-stack teammate within VS Code and the CLI. It handles complex tasks like feature implementation and project-wide refactoring by reading files, executing shell commands, and managing isolated workstreams via Git worktrees.

name: Qoder
description: Qoder is an autonomous development desktop and agentic AI coding platform designed to handle end-to-end software delivery rather than just line-by-line assistance. It features a specialized Quest Mode for delegating complex tasks to autonomous agents and a Repo Wiki for real-time codebase knowledge engineering.

name: Devin
description: Devin is the world's first fully autonomous AI software engineer, capable of planning and executing complex engineering tasks end-to-end. It operates in its own sandboxed environment with a shell, code editor, and browser to build, debug, and deploy software independently or alongside humans.

name: Z Code
description: Z Code is an Agentic Development Environment (ADE) designed as a comprehensive desktop workspace built entirely around AI agents. It bundles a file manager, terminal, Git panel, and live browser preview into a unified interface where agents can autonomously read code, execute commands, and manage project lifecycles.

name: toad
description: toad is a unified terminal user interface (TUI) for AI coding agents that blends a traditional shell workflow with powerful agentic AI. It provides a refined, beautiful interface for multiple agents including Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and OpenHands through the Agent Client Protocol (ACP).

name: Nimbalyst
description: Nimbalyst is an open-source, agent-native visual workspace that wraps AI coding tools like Claude Code and Codex in a GUI. It provides a visual layer for managing parallel AI sessions, reviewing diffs, and editing project artifacts like diagrams and mockups alongside code.

name: Superset
description: Superset is an AI-native development environment designed to orchestrate and run multiple AI coding agents in parallel. It utilizes isolated Git worktrees to prevent merge conflicts, allowing developers to manage dozens of autonomous agents for features, refactoring, and bug fixes simultaneously.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: The industry-standard AI coding assistant that has evolved from simple autocomplete into an agentic platform. It provides context-aware code suggestions, conversational chat, and autonomous agents capable of managing full-repository workflows from within the IDE or GitHub web interface.

name: Junie
description: Junie is an autonomous AI coding agent by JetBrains designed to handle complex, multi-step programming tasks across IDEs, terminals, and CI/CD pipelines. It leverages deep project context to create execution plans, write code, run tests, and perform inspections while allowing developers to review and steer every action.

name: Gemini Code Assist
description: A sophisticated AI coding assistant from Google that integrates into major IDEs to provide context-aware development support. It leverages massive context windows to understand entire codebases and automate complex workflows across the software development lifecycle.

name: Amazon Q Developer
description: A comprehensive AI development assistant from AWS that provides real-time code suggestions, autonomous agents for multi-step tasks, and expert-level AWS infrastructure guidance. It excels at legacy code modernization and deep integration with the AWS ecosystem.

name: Tabnine
description: Tabnine is a privacy-first AI coding assistant that provides context-aware code completions and an integrated chat interface for developers. It specializes in secure deployments, offering on-premises and air-gapped options while allowing teams to switch between various high-performance LLMs.

name: Cline
description: An open-source autonomous AI coding agent that integrates with your editor and terminal to execute complex development tasks. It can read/write files, run commands, and browse the web, requiring your approval for every action taken.

name: Kilo Code
description: Kilo Code is an open-source agentic engineering platform that functions as a highly flexible AI coding assistant for VS Code and JetBrains. It allows developers to bring their own API keys, use local models via Ollama, or access over 500 models through a managed provider with no price markup.

name: Roo Code
description: An autonomous AI coding agent for VS Code that functions as a multi-role development team within the editor. It can autonomously read and write files, execute terminal commands, and browse the web to complete complex software engineering tasks.

name: Continue
description: Continue is the leading open-source AI coding assistant that brings the power of any LLM directly into VS Code and JetBrains. It allows developers to build custom AI workflows, chat with their codebase, and automate repetitive tasks using both cloud-based and local models.

name: Augment Code
description: A high-performance AI coding assistant built for large-scale enterprise codebases. It features a proprietary Context Engine that indexes hundreds of thousands of files across multiple repositories to provide highly accurate, context-aware code completions and refactoring.

name: Cody
description: An enterprise-focused AI coding assistant built on Sourcegraph's code intelligence platform to provide deep context across entire multi-repository codebases. It uses a search-first architecture to help developers navigate complex architectures, automate large-scale refactors, and maintain architectural consistency.

name: Supermaven
description: Supermaven is a high-performance AI coding assistant known for its sub-100ms latency and industry-leading 1-million token context window. It provides near-instant inline completions and an integrated chat interface across VS Code, JetBrains, and Neovim. Following its acquisition by Cursor, the tool continues to be a premier choice for developers who want codebase-aware suggestions within their existing IDE.

name: Blackbox
description: A comprehensive AI coding platform that utilizes a multi-agent orchestration system called Chairman LLM to run tasks across 300+ models simultaneously. It provides seamless code generation, debugging, and project indexing across IDEs, mobile devices, and the terminal.

name: Snyk Code
description: An AI-powered Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tool that identifies and helps remediate vulnerabilities in proprietary code in real-time. It leverages the DeepCode AI engine to provide developers with actionable fix suggestions and deep data-flow analysis directly within their IDE or Git workflow.

name: Qodo
description: Qodo (formerly CodiumAI) is a quality-first AI coding platform focusing on code integrity through automated testing, multi-agent reviews, and deep codebase context. It operates across IDEs, Git providers, and CLI workflows to ensure code is not just generated, but correct and compliant.

name: MarsCode
description: An AI-powered development suite by ByteDance that integrates a cloud-based IDE with an intelligent assistant plugin for VS Code and JetBrains. It provides context-aware code completion, debugging assistance, and deep repository insights for over 100 programming languages.

name: Replit AI
description: A cloud-based, AI-native development platform that enables users to build, deploy, and host full-stack applications entirely in the browser. It combines an autonomous coding agent with a collaborative IDE to transform natural language prompts into production-ready software.

name: CodeBuddy
description: A comprehensive AI-driven development platform that integrates requirements analysis, design-to-code conversion, and automated deployment. It features a unique 'conversation-is-programming' workflow available via an AI-native IDE, a professional CLI tool, and editor plugins.

name: Cortex Code
description: An AI-native agent purpose-built for the Snowflake Data Cloud that automates complex data engineering, analytics, and application development. It deeply understands Snowflake-specific context, including schemas, RBAC permissions, and governance policies to generate production-ready code.

name: Kode
description: Kode is an AI-powered terminal assistant and agentic framework designed for autonomous coding and workflow orchestration. It enables developers to manage entire codebases, execute terminal commands, and build custom multi-agent systems via a specialized CLI and SDK.

name: Apertis
description: Apertis is a unified AI gateway and control plane designed specifically for coding agents and AI applications. It provides a single API endpoint to access over 500 models from providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google with built-in failover and cost optimization.

name: Corust
description: Corust is a specialized AI development suite purpose-built for the Rust ecosystem, providing deep awareness of the language's unique ownership and lifetime models. It features a fine-tuned LLM that integrates across a Zed extension, a GitHub PR reviewer, and a CLI agent to deliver production-grade code generation.

name: Toprank
description: An open-source suite of Claude Code skills designed to automate SEO audits, Google Ads optimization, and content creation. It enables AI agents to directly analyze Search Console and ad platform data to fix technical issues and reduce wasted spend.

name: WozCode
description: WozCode is a high-performance plugin for the Claude Code CLI designed to optimize token usage and accelerate AI-assisted development. It replaces standard file tools with token-efficient alternatives, allowing developers to execute complex codebase edits with fewer API roundtrips and significantly lower costs.

name: Claude Code Skills 中文精选集
description: A curated Chinese repository and toolset designed to enhance Claude Code with over 100 specialized skills and 18 original automation packages. It provides developers with ready-to-use, localized tools for tasks such as automated code reviews, documentation generation, and performance profiling.

name: Oh My codeX
description: Oh My codeX (OMX) is a sophisticated orchestration and workflow layer for the OpenAI Codex CLI that adds structure, persistent state, and multi-agent coordination. It transforms the standard Codex experience into a manageable development environment with standardized pipelines for planning, execution, and verification.

name: Bob
description: Bob is an AI-first development partner designed to manage the full software development lifecycle, from planning and coding to testing and modernization. It uses agentic workflows and human-in-the-loop checkpoints to ensure secure, governed code production at enterprise scale.

name: Firebender
description: Firebender is an AI-native coding assistant specifically optimized for Android Studio and IntelliJ environments. Unlike general-purpose AI tools, it integrates directly with the Android emulator, Logcat, and Compose previews to automate complex tasks like building features and fixing runtime issues.

name: Claude Code
description: An agentic command-line tool that enables developers to delegate complex coding tasks, like multi-file refactors and debugging, directly from their terminal. It autonomously plans, executes, and tests changes across an entire codebase while integrating with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and GitHub CLI.

name: Codex CLI
description: A high-performance, terminal-native AI coding agent built in Rust that allows developers to edit codebases, run tests, and manage workflows directly from the shell. It supports multimodal inputs and features a secure, sandboxed environment for executing autonomous tasks.

name: Aider
description: Aider is a leading terminal-based AI pair programming tool that allows developers to edit code across multiple files within local Git repositories. It automatically maps your codebase for context and handles Git commits with descriptive messages for every change it makes.

name: Gemini CLI
description: An open-source AI agent that brings Google's multimodal Gemini models directly into the terminal for local code manipulation and task automation. It uses a ReAct loop to interact with your file system, execute shell commands, and perform web searches within your development context.

name: Goose
description: An open-source, autonomous AI coding agent that runs locally to execute multi-step development tasks including editing code, running tests, and managing shells. Built in Rust by Block, it is model-agnostic and designed to act as a 'junior developer' in your terminal or desktop environment.

name: Amazon Q CLI
description: An AI-powered terminal assistant that brings IDE-style autocompletions to 500+ popular CLIs and offers a natural language chat interface to execute complex, multi-step development tasks directly in your shell.

name: Letta Code
description: Letta Code is a memory-first coding harness designed for long-lived agents that persist across sessions and learn from experience. It uses a tiered memory system to maintain deep codebase context, allowing the assistant to function as a permanent digital co-worker rather than a stateless chat helper.

name: Qwen CLI
description: An open-source command-line AI agent optimized for Alibaba's Qwen3-Coder models, designed to manage large codebases and automate developer workflows directly from the terminal. It supports deep codebase comprehension and agentic tasks like refactoring, testing, and multi-file editing.

name: Codebuff
description: Codebuff is an open-source, terminal-based AI coding assistant that utilizes a multi-agent architecture to edit entire codebases via natural language. It coordinates specialized agents for planning, editing, and reviewing to ensure high-precision, cross-file changes with deep context awareness.

name: OpenClaw
description: OpenClaw is an autonomous, open-source AI agent that runs on your local system or server to automate workflows across your computer, browser, and applications. It acts as a proactive digital worker that connects to messaging platforms like WhatsApp and Discord to execute real-world tasks 24/7.

name: Command Code
description: Command Code is a terminal-native AI coding agent that utilizes a meta neuro-symbolic model called taste-1 to learn and adapt to your personal coding style. It observes your development patterns to autogenerate project-level skills and memory, allowing for a highly personalized and consistent AI pair-programming experience. The tool is designed to replace generic LLM 'slop' with code that matches your team's specific architectural preferences.

name: Crush
description: Crush is a terminal-native, agentic AI coding assistant that integrates directly into your command-line workflow. It provides a glamorous TUI experience while connecting to a wide range of LLMs to read, write, and execute code in your local environment.

name: iFlow CLI
description: A terminal-native AI assistant designed for deep repository analysis, code automation, and natural language workflow execution. It allows developers to interact with advanced AI models directly from their command line to refactor code, generate documentation, and automate system tasks.

name: Kiro CLI
description: An agentic AI-powered terminal interface from AWS designed for cloud infrastructure management and software development. It uses natural language to automate DevOps tasks, manage AWS resources, and implement code through a structured, spec-driven workflow.

name: lucinate
description: A terminal-native AI chat client (TUI) designed for developers who live in the command line. It offers a mouse-free interface to interact with various AI agents while supporting local shell command execution and session persistence.

name: MCPJam
description: MCPJam is an open-source development platform and visual inspector for the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It provides a Postman-like workbench for developers to debug, test, and preview MCP servers and interactive widgets across various LLMs including Claude and GPT-4o.

name: Mistral Vibe
description: A terminal-native AI coding agent that provides a conversational interface to explore, modify, and orchestrate changes across entire codebases. It leverages project-aware context and autonomous command execution to handle complex, multi-file developer workflows.

name: Mux
description: An open-source coding agent multiplexer designed to run and orchestrate multiple AI agents in parallel. It enables developers to execute complex, long-running tasks across isolated local or remote workspaces using various LLMs simultaneously.

name: Zencoder
description: Zencoder is an AI coding agent platform that integrates natively with VS Code and JetBrains to provide deep codebase understanding through its Repo Grokking technology. It employs a multi-agent architecture to automate complex software engineering tasks like refactoring, unit testing, and cross-file feature development.

name: Neovate
description: Neovate is an open-source AI coding agent designed to enhance development workflows through natural language code generation, bug fixing, and automated testing. It provides both a powerful terminal-based CLI and a native desktop application with deep Git integration and multi-file editing capabilities.

name: AdaL
description: AdaL is a terminal-first, self-evolving AI coding agent that executes CLI commands, manages Git branches, and learns from your codebase patterns. It serves as an agentic companion that automates professional workflows while maintaining transparency through high-fidelity diff views and local execution.

name: Cline Kanban
description: A web-based orchestration board that brings AI coding agents out of the terminal and into a visual project management interface. It allows developers to run and monitor multiple agents in parallel, each operating in isolated git worktrees to prevent merge conflicts.

name: Parallel Code
description: Parallel Code is an open-source desktop application that automates Git worktree management to run multiple AI coding agents in parallel. It provides a tiled terminal dashboard for dispatching independent tasks to agents like Claude Code or Aider, ensuring conflict-free development through automated branch isolation.

name: Pi
description: A minimal terminal-based AI coding harness that prioritizes extensibility and context efficiency. It provides a core set of primitives for file manipulation and shell access, allowing developers to build custom coding agents using TypeScript.

name: Autohand ACP
description: Autohand ACP is a specialized integration layer that connects the Autohand Code CLI agent to IDEs like Zed and JetBrains via the Agent Client Protocol. It enables a reasoning-driven AI workflow capable of autonomous planning, multi-file refactors, and terminal execution within the editor.

name: Crow CLI
description: A minimal, native Agent Client Protocol (ACP) terminal agent designed for developers who value transparency and direct control over their AI toolchain. It provides a reference implementation of the ACP spec without heavy abstractions, utilizing pure Python and the OpenAI SDK for a lightweight execution loop.

name: Fast Agent
description: An open-source Python framework for building and running AI agents with complete Model Context Protocol (MCP) support. It features a declarative, file-centric approach to simplify the orchestration of complex multi-model workflows and tool integrations.

name: Minion Code
description: A terminal-native AI coding assistant built on the Minion framework that serves as an open-source implementation of Claude Code. It provides a robust set of tools for autonomous file editing, shell command execution, and deep codebase navigation.

name: Compass Nova CLI
description: A terminal-first AI development assistant that provides deep codebase understanding with a 200K token context window. It allows developers to describe tasks in plain English to handle file operations, code generation, and git management without leaving the command line.

name: Pi ACP
description: An Agent Client Protocol (ACP) adapter that bridges the pi coding agent with compatible IDEs like Zed. It translates JSON-RPC requests over stdio, allowing developers to use pi's agentic capabilities directly within their editor workflow.

name: Stakpak Agent
description: Stakpak Agent is a terminal-native, open-source AI DevOps agent built in Rust designed to automate infrastructure management and production operations. It features a security-first architecture with secret redaction and deterministic guardrails, allowing it to handle deployments, incident response, and cost optimization autonomously 24/7.

name: OpenCode
description: OpenCode is a privacy-first, open-source AI coding agent designed primarily for the terminal, featuring a dual-agent system for planning and execution. It is provider-agnostic, supporting over 75 LLM backends including local models and major cloud providers via LSP integration.

name: Warp
description: Warp is a high-performance, Rust-based terminal that integrates AI agents and IDE-like features directly into the command line. It uses a unique block-based interface to organize command outputs and features 'Oz,' an AI assistant capable of autonomous task execution and debugging.

name: Wave
description: An AI-native terminal that combines the traditional command line with modern graphical features like inline file previews, a built-in code editor, and a web browser. It is designed to reduce context switching by keeping development tools and AI assistance within a single, persistent workspace.

name: Devin
description: Devin is the first fully autonomous AI software engineer, capable of planning and executing complex development tasks from start to finish. It works within a secure sandboxed environment equipped with its own shell, code editor, and browser to handle bug fixes, migrations, and feature development independently.

name: Jules
description: Jules is an asynchronous AI coding agent that autonomously handles entire software development tasks like bug fixes, feature implementation, and test generation. Unlike real-time copilots, it works in the background by cloning your repository into a secure cloud VM to analyze context and submit pull requests.

name: OpenHands
description: An open-source AI platform that provides autonomous software development agents capable of writing code, running terminal commands, and browsing the web. It functions as a virtual engineer that can independently resolve GitHub issues and manage complex coding tasks within a secure sandbox environment.

name: SWE-agent
description: An autonomous software engineering framework that enables language models to resolve real-world GitHub issues by interacting with a sandboxed terminal. It utilizes a specialized Agent-Computer Interface (ACI) to help models browse repositories, edit files, and execute tests with state-of-the-art efficiency.

name: Sweep
description: A high-performance AI coding assistant natively built for the JetBrains IDE ecosystem. It combines low-latency autocomplete with autonomous agents capable of handling multi-file refactoring, bug fixes, and integrated code reviews.

name: Ellipsis
description: Ellipsis is an AI developer tool that provides automated code reviews and bug fixes directly within GitHub pull requests. It acts as a virtual teammate that can generate tested code changes from natural language comments and enforce custom style guides.

name: Genie
description: Genie is an autonomous AI software engineer designed to handle end-to-end coding tasks by mimicking human reasoning and workflows. It operates as an 'AI colleague' that can independently solve bugs, build features, and open production-ready pull requests within complex codebases.

name: Open-yak
description: An open-source local AI agent and desktop workbench designed to automate file operations, code editing, and document synthesis. It prioritizes privacy by keeping all data on-device while providing a private, BYOK alternative to tools like Claude Code and OpenAI Codex.

name: DeepAgents JS
description: An opinionated, batteries-included agent harness built on LangGraph for creating sophisticated AI agents that handle complex, multi-step tasks. It provides ready-to-use capabilities for planning, filesystem management, and sub-agent delegation out of the box.

name: Bolt.new
description: An AI-powered full-stack web development agent that allows developers to prompt, run, edit, and deploy entire applications directly in the browser. Leveraging StackBlitz's WebContainer technology, it provides a complete Node.js environment without requiring any local setup.

name: v0
description: v0 is an AI-powered generative UI and development platform that transforms text prompts and design mockups into production-ready React code. It integrates a full VS Code-style editor and Git workflows directly into the Vercel ecosystem for rapid full-stack prototyping.

name: Lovable
description: An AI-powered full-stack web application builder that transforms natural language prompts into functional React applications with Supabase backends. It utilizes a conversational 'vibe coding' interface to handle everything from frontend UI to database orchestration and deployment.

name: Replit
description: A comprehensive cloud-based IDE and deployment platform powered by autonomous AI agents. It enables developers and 'vibe coders' to build, host, and collaborate on full-stack apps entirely in the browser or via mobile.

name: PlayCode
description: PlayCode is an AI-powered development platform that converts natural language descriptions into professional, hosted websites and applications. It combines a conversational AI assistant with a real-time visual editor and provides full access to production-ready React, Vue, and HTML code.

name: Emergent.sh
description: An agentic 'vibe coding' platform that uses a coordinated team of AI agents to design, code, test, and deploy full-stack applications from natural language prompts. It generates production-grade code in React, Next.js, and FastAPI while maintaining bidirectional sync with GitHub for full developer ownership.

name: Bitrig
description: Bitrig is an AI-powered development platform that allows users to build native iOS and macOS apps through natural language conversations. Developed by ex-Apple engineers who co-created SwiftUI, it generates real, editable Swift code and features a custom interpreter for instant on-device previews.

name: Manus
description: Manus is an autonomous general-purpose AI agent that moves beyond simple conversation to independently execute complex end-to-end workflows like coding, research, and data analysis. It operates using its own virtualized computer environment, allowing it to browse the web, manage files, and deliver production-ready results with minimal human intervention.

name: CodeRabbit
description: CodeRabbit is an AI-powered code review platform that provides context-aware, line-by-line feedback and automated pull request summaries. It automates the review process across GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, and Azure DevOps, offering one-click fixes and architectural insights.

name: Qodo
description: An AI-powered code integrity platform that provides automated code reviews, test generation, and deep codebase intelligence. It functions as a quality layer across the SDLC, integrating with IDEs, Git providers, and CI/CD pipelines to ensure code reliability.

name: Snyk Code
description: Snyk Code is an AI-powered static application security testing (SAST) tool that identifies vulnerabilities in proprietary code in real-time. It integrates directly into developer workflows to provide actionable fix suggestions and automated remediation, significantly reducing the time to fix security issues without requiring a build step.

name: GitAuto
description: An autonomous AI software engineer agent that lives in your GitHub repository to fix bugs, implement features, and generate unit tests. It converts issues into pull requests by reading your code and context, then automatically iterates on CI failures until the code is merge-ready.

name: AgentDiff
description: AgentDiff is a GitHub App that tests AI agents for regressions by running prompts from real residential IPs across global regions. It compares responses between base and preview versions to catch network-specific failures and geo-routing issues that standard cloud CI environments miss.

name: Claude
description: A frontier AI assistant optimized for agentic coding, complex reasoning, and massive context handling with up to 1 million tokens. It features a suite of developer tools including the Claude Code CLI and 'Computer Use' capabilities that allow the model to interact directly with a developer's desktop environment.

name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's flagship AI assistant, offering advanced multimodal capabilities including code generation, multi-step research, and autonomous agents. It serves as a comprehensive pair programmer through specialized Codex integration, an interactive Canvas workspace, and direct GitHub repository synchronization.

name: Gemini
description: Google's most capable family of multimodal AI models, offering industry-leading context windows and deep integration across the Google developer ecosystem. It excels at reasoning over massive codebases, processing video, and executing complex agentic workflows.

name: DeepSeek
description: DeepSeek is a high-performance AI platform offering open-weights models specifically optimized for coding, mathematics, and advanced reasoning. Its flagship V4 architecture provides frontier-level performance and massive context windows at a fraction of the cost of proprietary competitors.

name: Perplexity
description: Perplexity is an AI-powered 'answer engine' that provides real-time, cited responses to technical queries by indexing the web. It functions as a research assistant for developers, enabling deep dives into documentation, framework comparisons, and automated workflow execution with transparent sources.

name: Greptile
description: Greptile is an AI code review platform that indexes entire repositories to provide reviews with deep codebase context. It integrates with GitHub and GitLab to catch logic bugs and architectural issues while learning from a team's unique coding standards.

name: Fern
description: Fern is an open-source platform that automates the creation of idiomatic, type-safe SDKs and Stripe-style API documentation from OpenAPI specifications. It streamlines the developer experience by keeping client libraries, documentation, and API definitions perfectly in sync through a docs-as-code workflow.

name: Pieces for Developers
description: An AI-powered long-term memory engine and snippet manager that captures your entire development workflow across the IDE, browser, and terminal. It automatically organizes code, links, and context to eliminate mental friction when switching tasks or projects.

name: agenttrace
description: A local-first Terminal User Interface (TUI) for auditing and observing AI coding agent sessions. It provides deep visibility into token costs, tool failures, and latency across agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and Aider without requiring cloud data uploads.

name: Vibe Kanban
description: A Rust-based orchestration platform that uses a visual Kanban board to manage and run multiple AI coding agents in parallel. It isolates agent activities in dedicated Git worktrees, allowing developers to orchestrate complex workflows from planning to pull request creation.

name: Visual Studio Code
description: A highly extensible, lightweight source code editor that has become the industry standard for modern web and cloud development. It combines the simplicity of a code editor with powerful developer tools like IntelliSense, debugging, and deep Git integration.

name: Xcode
description: The official integrated development environment for Apple platforms, providing a comprehensive suite of tools for building, testing, and distributing apps. It features deep integration with Apple's ecosystem, including powerful simulators, native AI coding assistance, and advanced performance analysis tools.

name: JetBrains IDEs
description: A professional suite of IDEs with deeply integrated AI capabilities that leverage native semantic code analysis. The platform features the Junie autonomous agent and native support for switching between frontier models like GPT-5 and Claude 4.5.

name: Visual Studio
description: Microsoft's flagship integrated development environment (IDE) tailored for high-scale application development across web, cloud, and mobile. It offers deep native integration with GitHub Copilot and the .NET ecosystem, providing a heavy-duty suite of AI-assisted productivity tools for professional software engineers.
